sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113176" key="xalkotore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκο-τορέω</orth>, <sense id="n113176.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to work</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form of bronze,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔντεα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
